item.title: Audi A4 Diagnostic Trouble Raises Repair Costs
item.description: An Audi A4 repair case shows how complex diagnostics can increase labor time and push the bill higher.

item.title: K10 Silverado Has 2 Gremlins to Fix

item.title: Cost to Fix a 1992 Mercedes-Benz 300E
